conditions.message: The output vocabulary avoids over-claiming: optional command failures are surfaced as advisory failures that do not block, optional passes do not create advisory noise, no-op/enforcement vocabulary remains distinct, and partial coverage remains explicit without weakening command evidence.

Agent Mail 2568: PrintLintSummaryWithOptions prints advisory failure text and keeps partial coverage separate.
Agent Mail 2568: tests cover optional failure advisory output, optional pass with no advisory failures, and partial coverage preserving command-output evidence.

conditions.message: New output behavior has direct tests for optional failures, optional passes, and coverage evidence preservation.

Agent Mail 2567: staged lint.go adds AdvisoryFailures, optional failed command ID append, and human summary text.
